Headline: #59 59th/61st Temporary Reroute at 59th/Union
ShortDescription: 59 59th/61st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 59th/Union.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#59 59th/61st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 59th, Union, 63rd, Stewart, 59th and over to normal route, due to street blockage near 59th/Union.

Allow extra travel time.
